title: DOL proposes new collection form for employers seeking to employ H-2B nonimmigrant workers
description_html:
DOL issued a notice of availability and request for comments on proposed information collection for new attestation form required under the 12/2/24 DOL and DHS temporary final rule increasing the number of H-2B visas available in fiscal year 2025. The information collection request includes a new form, Attestation for Employers Seeking to Employ H–2B Nonimmigrant Workers.

Comments are due by May 19, 2025.
